diffs.diff:
--- a/test_imports.py
+++ b/test_imports.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import sys

+print('starting', flush=True)

+

+# 1. torch_scatter

+print('importing torch_scatter...', flush=True)

+import torch_scatter

+print('torch_scatter ok', flush=True)

+

+# 2. torchmdnet

+print('importing torchmdnet...', flush=True)

+import torchmdnet

+print('torchmdnet ok', flush=True)

+

+# 3. e3nn

+print('importing e3nn...', flush=True)

+import e3nn

+print('e3nn ok', flush=True)

+

+# 4. PaiNN

+print('importing PaiNN...', flush=True)

+from torchmdnet.models import PaiNN

+print('PaiNN imported', flush=True)

+

+print('creating PaiNN model...', flush=True)

+model = PaiNN()

+print('PaiNN created, total params:', sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters()), flush=True)

+

+print('All tests passed!', flush=True)
